text:
Created attachment 168804
btsync diff

I guess I spoke too soon! I'm getting spammed by the freebsd build server.
One tricky thing about this port is because the filename for the download doesn't change between versions 'make makesum' will give you the size/checksum of old versions of the distfiles unless you clean them out first.

Can you please commit this change? Thanks
